title: CONNECTOR_0_2_17_RELEASE_REPORT.md
text:
# Core Codex Connector 0.2.17 Release Report

Data: 2026-05-21

## Scopo

Rendere il connettore piu utile per lavoro multi-Codex / CodexAI orchestratore:

- sessioni;
- lock;
- checkpoint;
- final report;
- stato orchestratore;
- doctor.

## Modifiche

- Aggiunti comandi:
  - `session-start`
  - `lock`
  - `unlock`
  - `checkpoint`
  - `finalize`
  - `orchestrator-status`
  - `doctor`
- Aggiunte cartelle operative:
  - `SHARED_MEMORY/sessions/`
  - `SHARED_MEMORY/locks/`
  - `SHARED_MEMORY/checkpoints/`
  - `SHARED_MEMORY/reports/codex-orchestrator/`
  - `SHARED_MEMORY/events/EVENTS.jsonl`
- Aggiornato `agents-rule` con regole multi-Codex.
- Aggiornato `README.md`.
- Versione pacchetto: `0.2.17`.

## Test

- `node --check packages/core-codex-connector/src/cli.mjs` -> OK
- `node packages/core-codex-connector/src/cli.mjs --help` -> OK
- `session-start` -> OK
- `lock` -> OK
- `checkpoint` -> OK
- `orchestrator-status` -> OK
- `doctor` -> OK, Core Render raggiunto in `322 ms`
- `unlock` -> OK
- `finalize` -> OK
- `orchestrator-status` finale -> `locks=0`

## Pacchetto

Creato:

`packages/core-codex-connector/skinharmony-core-codex-connector-0.2.17.tgz`

Dettagli npm:

- size: `34.7 kB`
- unpacked: `136.9 kB`
- shasum: `bc7aa6db291e653197e5fcd3f0286595775a64d0`

## Uso consigliato per altri Codex

All'avvio:

```bash
sh-core-codex session-start --role worker --agent-id codex_worker_01 --scope <scope>
```

Prima di modificare:

```bash
sh-core-codex lock --name <path-or-module>
```

Durante:

```bash
sh-core-codex checkpoint --title "..." --summary "..." --file <path>
```

Fine:

```bash
sh-core-codex finalize --summary "..." --file <path> --test "..."
sh-core-codex unlock --name <path-or-module>
```

## Stato

Pronto per installazione/test sugli altri ambienti Codex.
